chunks.text: Tom and I are good friends, and we are similar in many ways.
When we measured our heights, I was almost as tall as Tom.
When we ran a race in the park
we ran almost as fast as each other.
When I lifted his bag, it was as heavy as mine.
It must be full of books.
Today was as cold as yesterday.
For me, reading books is as fun as watching TV.
But I am not so good at math.
Math is not as easy as English for me.
